//: Shared TypeScript compiler options for all workspace packages. Future packages (packages/* and apps/*) will extend this. apps/web/tsconfig.json is intentionally NOT updated to extend this in PR1 — it has app-specific settings (target ES2017, jsx react-jsx) that we don't want to touch as part of the workspace bootstrap. Path aliases for @ft/* packages will be added here once those packages exist (PR4+).
